name: Demo Market Collector
description: A fully local demo skill used by npm run demo. It collects product cards from an embedded HTML page.

steps.name: products
steps.expression: Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('[data-product-card]')).map((el) => ({ id: el.dataset.id, title: el.querySelector('[data-title]')?.textContent.trim(), price: Number(el.querySelector('[data-price]')?.textContent.replace(/[^0-9.]/g, '')), rating: Number(el.querySelector('[data-rating]')?.textContent), source: location.href, capturedAt: new Date().toISOString() }))
